title: Rust: include current_channel in Announce::signed_data() and update codec for CCP-9
description: Add current_channel field to Announce and AnnounceBuilder. Update signed_data_len, write_signed_data to include it after seq_num (to bind announced channel per security review). Update parse, tests, wire format to match Python (add rx_channel byte after hop_count, adjust offsets, FIXED_LENGTH=94). Update L2 payload tests if affected. Security consistency with Python/C. --parent=project-LICHEN-3i18 --type=task --priority=1 --labels=codereview
